name: @migration-utility/evals
description: Promptfoo eval harness for agent and skill testing

scripts.postrestore: git checkout -- fixtures/ && git clean -fd fixtures/
scripts.eval: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/scoping/skill-discover-show.yaml -c packages/scoping/agent-scoping.yaml -c packages/profiler/skill-profile.yaml -c packages/profiler/agent-profiler.yaml -c packages/migrator/skill-migrate.yaml -c packages/migrator/agent-migrator.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:scoping: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/scoping/skill-discover-show.yaml -c packages/scoping/agent-scoping.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:scoping:skill: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/scoping/skill-discover-show.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:scoping:agent: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/scoping/agent-scoping.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:profiler: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/profiler/skill-profile.yaml -c packages/profiler/agent-profiler.yaml; npm run postrestore
scripts.eval:migrator: npm run prerestore && promptfoo eval --no-cache -c packages/migrator/skill-migrate.yaml -c packages/migrator/agent-migrator.yaml; npm run postrestore
